description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-number-input` (T1-07). 5/6 libraries ship this.

NOTE: This component arrived via `rescue/abandoned-components` (PR #175). Verify PR #175 is merged to dev before starting. Files at `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-number-input/`.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, min/max/step/value typing, stepper button event types, ElementInternals form association
2. Accessibility — numeric input with `type="number"` considerations vs pattern+inputmode, stepper buttons labeled (aria-label), keyboard (arrow keys increment/decrement, Enter submits), `aria-valuemin`/`aria-valuemax` if applicable, axe-core pass
3. Tests — increment/decrement buttons, min/max clamping, step precision, form association, disabled/readonly, keyboard nav
4. Storybook — min/max/step demos, with/without steppers, error states
5. CSS — stepper button styling, `--hx-*` tokens, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — form-associated, Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-number-input/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-number-input — T1-07 antagonistic quality review
